name: the-commons-root
description: Root orchestrator for The Commons backend services

scripts.start-backend: npx concurrently -k -n auth,comm,events,ai,gateway -c red,blue,yellow,green,magenta "npm --prefix services/auth-service start" "npm --prefix services/community-service start" "npm --prefix services/business-events-service start" "npm --prefix services/ai-service start" "npm --prefix gateway start"
scripts.dev-backend: npx concurrently -k -n auth,comm,events,ai,gateway -c red,blue,yellow,green,magenta "npm --prefix services/auth-service run dev" "npm --prefix services/community-service run dev" "npm --prefix services/business-events-service run dev" "npm --prefix services/ai-service run dev" "npm --prefix gateway run dev"
